home.summary: I build internal software, landing pages, mobile apps, and data-heavy operational tools for real business workflows.
home.calloutTitle: Most of my work lives in private products.
home.calloutBody: This portfolio focuses on what I built, the workflows I improved, and the kind of systems I can own end to end.

about.title: Tech stack with structure, not sticker collection.
about.intro: I work across web and mobile. The tools below are the ones I reach for when the job needs clear UX, reliable data handling, and practical delivery.

frontend.title: Frontend first, but not frontend only
frontend.body: I care about UI feel, but I am comfortable owning the API, data flow, and deployment path behind it.

business.title: Built for real workflows
business.body: My strongest work lives in dashboards, reporting flows, internal tools, and collaborative admin systems.

tools.title: Proven tools over hype
tools.body: React, Node, SQL and NoSQL storage, and practical hosting cover most of what I need.

frontend.title: Frontend foundations
frontend.description: The UI layer I use to build responsive, multilingual, data-heavy interfaces.

mobile.title: Mobile development
mobile.description: Tools I use for scanner-based apps, native work, and mobile companions for internal platforms.

backend.title: Backend and data
backend.description: Services, realtime flows, and storage options I rely on for operational products.

delivery.title: Delivery and workflow
delivery.description: Version control, containers, and hosting platforms I use to ship and iterate.

projects.title: Projects I have worked on.
projects.intro: Each project is shown as a compact card with a brief description. The carousel structure is already in place so I can plug your screenshots in when you send them.
projects.privateNote: All repositories are private, so this section focuses on the work itself instead of linking code.

contact.title: Private work, demos, and walkthroughs available on request.
contact.description: Most of my work lives inside private company products, so this portfolio is centered on the workflows, systems, and mobile/web solutions I built.
contact.note: When you send screenshots, I can swap every placeholder slide for real project images.
contact.privateTitle: What this section is ready for
contact.privateBody: Private project demos, screenshots, and deeper walkthroughs can be added without changing the structure again.
